name: Mecha Sonic, Metal Sonic and Furnace! The JJLM DESTROYER!
description:
I have become deth... destroyer of JJLM.

300 followers special, finally here. Get crushed, skewered and turned into a pancake all at once. Will this work? I dunno, the site doesn't allow me to edit characters for some reason, so this will be the first and only version until JJLM allows me to edit once more. This was supposed to be a quick work, but the site coulnd't handle the power of 11K tokens and crashed on me many times whenever I tried editing/adding onto this bot. Oh, and this is a bot I had to stitch together from a Word document, because the one I had created last year crashed whenever I wanted to edit it.
creator: Chinchulin Trolin
